content: Vapi/Retell/ElevenLabs Agents operator side: call/session logs with recordings + transcripts, real-time analytics dashboards (by agent/time/model), per-conversation inspection with evaluation criteria outcomes, concurrency limits gated by plan tier, spend visibility. ElevenLabs: call history tab with per-conversation eval results and rationale; analytics broken down by agent/branch/period/model. Table stakes for operators: session list, transcript inspection, usage totals, spend caps.
